"'''The Drop'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6]]''. It features [[High Orbit Precision Entry Squad|H.O.P.E. Squad]] on a mission to [[Yorn Skot]].

==Plot summary==
H.O.P.E. squad is assigned to Yorn Skot to rescue [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Treetower]] and retrieve the smuggled goods he was trying to intercept. They are orbitally inserted and land safely on a floating platform. Treetower's locator indicates that he is on the unipod on the underside of the platform.

The squad rappels down to get to him. Suddenly, four [[B2-AA air assault super battle droid|jump droids]] arrive. The commandos are "sitting [[Duck/Legends|ducks]]," and only the orange-armored trooper survives. He jumps on a droid and steals its [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. Another droid fires a stun net at him, and it shorts out his jetpack. He uses the net to lasso and mount the droid, and shoots the other two. He then catches a falling Master Treetower, destroys the droid he is riding on, and jumps back to his rappelling line. They climb back up and soon discover that the cargo is [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] slaves.
